_comment: Hand-curated per-enhancement restrictions, keyed by faction name then enhancement name. Entries here override the auto-scraped layer at enhancement-restrictions.auto.json (manual wins per enhancement key). Schema per entry: { characterOnly?: boolean, nonCharacterOnly?: boolean, notOnEpicHeroes?: boolean, allowedHosts?: string[], requiredKeywords?: string[], limit?: number, autoTake?: string[] }. allowedHosts: exact host datasheet names — enforced today. requiredKeywords: captured from PDF host phrase as keyword tags (e.g. 'GRAVIS', 'LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE') — NOT yet enforced (will activate when datasheet keyword tracking lands), and when present it suppresses allowedHosts enforcement so we don't under-permit a partial disjunction. Example: "NECRONS": { "Enlivened Sentinels": { "allowedHosts": ["NECRON WARRIORS"], "limit": 1 } }
